top_signals.title: Oil Shocks Have Smaller Impact on US Than 1970s, Fed Study Finds
top_signals.summary: Domestic production of oil has significantly reduced the impact of energy-price shocks on US inflation and unemployment since the 1970s, according to new research from the Federal Reserve Bank of Boston.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Tariff fraud enforcement accelerates targeting importers over duty evasion
top_signals.summary:
First Brands, Perfectus, Canadian steel firms and Greenbrier are among recent targets in federal duty evasion actions

The post Tariff fraud enforcement accelerates targeting importers over duty evasion appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Active Stock Funds Reel as Big Tech’s Grip on Market Strengthens
top_signals.summary: Active stock pickers are finding it harder to stomach the pain of technology megacaps’ strengthening grip on the stock market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Jack Dorsey’s Contactless Payments Company Introduces a Wand
top_signals.summary: In the era of tap-to-pay, Block Inc. is trying to make things a little more enchanting.

top_signals.title: Jim Cramer: It may be time to trim 2 bank stocks but for very different reasons
top_signals.summary: The Investing Club holds its "Morning Meeting" every weekday at 10:20 a.m. ET.
